fit_reason: 3 convenient locations near Denver. Multi-location practice with high patient volume. Strong reviews indicate established revenue base well above $2k/month on booking.

fit_reason: Oral surgery group with multiple office locations throughout Idaho. Surgical specialty = high-value appointments ($500-$3000+). Every missed call is significant lost revenue. Multiple locations = centralized phone volume.
